data.name: Ullrid

weaponImprint.name: Rectrix
weaponImprint.trait: After using an active attack, gain 1 point of Confectance Index, can trigger a maximum of once per turn.
weaponImprint.effect: When using an active attack, deal additional fixed damage equal to 10%/12%/14%/16%/18%/20% of attack to targets not at full HP. For targets with lower HP percentage than the user, increase critical damage by 20%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage dealt to Marley Thermal Power Plant is increased by 2.5%. If the target's HP is not at max, it increases by an additional 2.5%.

data.effects: A Doll with great ambitions. She draws friends to her side with her bold nature and strong decisiveness. However, she occasionally longs for a quiet corner to unload her burden and rest.

skills.name: Warning Shot
skills.description: Select 1 enemy target within 5 tiles and deal Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Optical Camouflage
skills.description:
Gain 1 stack of [effect:4df7f2de-0e82-4406-9e50-d3db79689163] and 1 point of Confectance Index after active attacks.

At the end of an enemy unit's action, if Ullrid's HP is below 30%, gain 1 stack of [effect:84c330eb-743f-4497-8def-2baaceabf738] for 1 turn. Cooldown: 3 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
At the start of the battle, for each allied target on the field (excluding self), gain 1 stack of [effect:4df7f2de-0e82-4406-9e50-d3db79689163] and 1 point of Confectance Index.

Gain 1 stack of [effect:4df7f2de-0e82-4406-9e50-d3db79689163] and 1 point of Confectance Index after active attacks.

At the end of an enemy unit's action, if Ullrid's HP is below 30%, gain 1 stack of [effect:84c330eb-743f-4497-8def-2baaceabf738] for 1 turn. Cooldown: 3 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
At the start of the battle, for each allied target on the field (excluding self), gain 1 stack of [effect:4df7f2de-0e82-4406-9e50-d3db79689163] and 1 point of Confectance Index.

Gain 1 stack of [effect:4df7f2de-0e82-4406-9e50-d3db79689163] and 1 point of Confectance Index after active attacks.

Before attacking, if this unit has moved 2 tiles or more, increase attack by 20%.

At the end of an enemy unit's action, if Ullrid's HP is below 50%, gain 1 stack of [effect:84c330eb-743f-4497-8def-2baaceabf738] for 1 turn. Cooldown: 2 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: At the start of the battle, for each allied target on the field (excluding self), gain 1 stack of [effect:4df7f2de-0e82-4406-9e50-d3db79689163] and 1 point of Confectance Index.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: Before attacking, if this unit has moved 2 tiles or more, increase attack by 20%. If Ullrid's HP is below 50%, gain [effect:84c330eb-743f-4497-8def-2baaceabf738|doll:ullrid] and reduce the effect's cooldown by 1 turn.

skills.name: Hunter's Sight
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 1 tile, dealing melee Physical damage equal to 120% of attack and gains 6 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef]. If the target is not killed, applies [effect:e5e9a343-a00c-4482-ba42-71cf9c163b5a] for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 enemy target within 1 tile, dealing melee Physical damage equal to 120% of attack and gains 6 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef]. If the target is not killed, applies [effect:e5e9a343-a00c-4482-ba42-71cf9c163b5a] and [effect:4776f3a1-92cb-4e79-b018-35433bfdc6e2] for 2 turns. When Ullrid is attacked by a target with [effect:e5e9a343-a00c-4482-ba42-71cf9c163b5a], reduces damage taken by 20%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: If the target is not killed, applies [effect:4776f3a1-92cb-4e79-b018-35433bfdc6e2] to the enemy target for 2 turns. When Ullrid is attacked by a target with [effect:e5e9a343-a00c-4482-ba42-71cf9c163b5a], reduces damage taken.

skills.name: Blade Whirlwind
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 1 tile and deal melee Physical damage equal to 90% of attack to it. Gain [effect:73876bb7-ee48-40c2-b5c8-8722d06ce307] after attacking.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 enemy target within 1 tile and deal melee Physical damage equal to 90% of attack to it. Gain [effect:73876bb7-ee48-40c2-b5c8-8722d06ce307] after attacking. If attacking the same target within one action, increase damage dealt by 30%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
If attacking the same target within one action, increases damage dealt by 30%.

The effects of [effect:73876bb7-ee48-40c2-b5c8-8722d06ce307] are enhanced. Ignores Cover damage reduction when attacking.

skills.name: Hidden Pursuit
skills.description:
Select a tile in a cross-shaped area within 5 tiles, move to that tile and deal melee Physical damage equal to 180% of attack to the enemy target with the highest HP within 1 tile.

Consume all stacks of [effect:4df7f2de-0e82-4406-9e50-d3db79689163], for each stack consumed, increase damage dealt by this attack by 10%, up to a 30% increase. If there are 2 stacks of [effect:4df7f2de-0e82-4406-9e50-d3db79689163] or more, gain 2 stacks of [effect:84c330eb-743f-4497-8def-2baaceabf738] for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Select a tile in a cross-shaped area within 7 tiles, move to that tile and deal melee Physical damage equal to 180% of attack to the enemy target with the highest HP within 1 tile.

Consume all stacks of [effect:4df7f2de-0e82-4406-9e50-d3db79689163], for each stack consumed, increase damage dealt by this attack by 10%, up to a 60% increase. If there are 2 stacks of [effect:4df7f2de-0e82-4406-9e50-d3db79689163] or more, gain 2 stacks of [effect:84c330eb-743f-4497-8def-2baaceabf738] for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Select a tile in a cross-shaped area within 7 tiles, move to that tile and deal melee Physical damage equal to 180% of attack to the enemy target with the highest HP within 1 tile.

Consume all stacks of [effect:4df7f2de-0e82-4406-9e50-d3db79689163], for each stack consumed, increase damage dealt by this attack by 10%, up to a 60% increase. For every 2% of the enemy target's missing HP, increase attack by 1% for this skill. If there are 2 stacks of [effect:4df7f2de-0e82-4406-9e50-d3db79689163] or more, gain 1 stack of [effect:84c330eb-743f-4497-8def-2baaceabf738] for 1 turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Increase range by 2 tiles. Raise the damage increase cap to 60% by consuming [effect:4df7f2de-0e82-4406-9e50-d3db79689163].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
For every 2% of the enemy target's missing HP, increase self attack by 1% for this skill.

If this kills the target, increase damage dealt by the next active attack by 30%. If there are 2 stacks of [effect:4df7f2de-0e82-4406-9e50-d3db79689163] or more, gain only 1 stack of [effect:84c330eb-743f-4497-8def-2baaceabf738|doll:ullrid], but [effect:84c330eb-743f-4497-8def-2baaceabf738|doll:ullrid] is no longer consumed after taking damage.

keys.effect: If the enemy target's HP is not full before the attack, increase damage dealt to them by 7%.

After using Blade Whirlwind, if the target is still alive, follow up with 1 extra instance of Physical damage equal to 90% of attack and deals 1 point of stability damage. The damage of this attack is increased by 30%. This effect can be triggered up to 3 times per turn.

Before the active skill Blade Whirlwind is used, inflicts [effect:e5e9a343-a00c-4482-ba42-71cf9c163b5a] to the target. After said skill is used, the cooldown of the Ultimate skill Hidden Pursuit is reduced by 1 turn. If Ullrid continuously attacks the same target, she recovers 1 point of Confectance Index. This effect can be triggered up to once per round.

Before using the Ultimate skill Hidden Pursuit, Ullrid gains full stacks of [effect:4df7f2de-0e82-4406-9e50-d3db79689163].

[effect:4df7f2de-0e82-4406-9e50-d3db79689163] gains an additional effect: If Ullrid's critical rate is greater than 100%, for every 1% or critical rate overflow, her critical damage is increased by 0.3%. All allied units' melee damage is increased by 10%. For each stack of [effect:4df7f2de-0e82-4406-9e50-d3db79689163] consumed, she recovers 1 point of Confectance Index.

[effect:e5e9a343-a00c-4482-ba42-71cf9c163b5a] gains a new effect: The possessor gains [effect:1b73d68b-f004-4994-811a-53434c7d20f2].
When the user possesses [effect:73876bb7-ee48-40c2-b5c8-8722d06ce307], basic attacks and other active skills can be used, but it consumes an additional 2 points of Confectance Index.
Ignore 30% of the target enemy's defense when there are no other enemy units within 3 tiles of the target.
At the start of the battle, gains 3 points of Confectance Index.
When there are no allied units within 3 tiles of self (excluding summoned units), increase own critical rate by 20%.
When at full health, damage dealt is increased by 15%.
When exploiting phase weakness, gain [effect:90e40fd3-e06c-4dca-aa63-464cf6e0c9f7] for 2 turns.

vertebrae.effect:
If attacking the same target within one action, increases damage dealt by 30%.

The effects of [effect:73876bb7-ee48-40c2-b5c8-8722d06ce307] are enhanced. Ignores Cover damage reduction when attacking.

imagoforms.effect: When performing consecutive active attacks on the same enemy target in the same turn, critical damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Physical damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt to enemy targets with 50% or lower HP is increased by 10%.
Damage dealt to enemy units within 3 tiles is increased by 12%.

dollEffects.effectDetails:
{"mainDetails":"

When other allied units are on the field, this unit cannot be targeted by enemy basic attacks or active skills. This buff is consumed when damage is taken, and can stack up to 2 times. Cannot be cleansed.

","upgrades":[{"id":"a71400f2-a0e0-488d-9b8c-3ed1f2fee6c0","upgradeName":"V6","upgradeDetails":"

When other allied units are on the field, this unit cannot be targeted by enemy basic attacks or active skills. Cannot be cleansed.

","order":0}]}
At the end of action, if within a 5-tile radius of Ullrid, Ullrid inflicts AoE Physical damage equal to 100% of attack. Cannot be cleansed.

{"mainDetails":"

Gain 6 tiles of extra mobility, and allow for the use of Blade Whirlwind.

","upgrades":[{"id":"ab7c11b9-52c1-4116-aeee-eb96cacf79f6","upgradeName":"Ullrid Fixed Key 1","upgradeDetails":"

Gain 6 tiles of mobility, and allow for the use of Blade Whirlwind. When using a basic attack or other active skills, additionally consume 2 points of Confectance Index.

","order":0},{"id":"03c4e01a-9bc9-4c62-ac5d-73c6977211c9","upgradeName":"V1","upgradeDetails":"

Gain 6 tiles of extra mobility, and allow for the use of Blade Whirlwind. Ignore Cover damage reduction when attacking.

","order":1}]}
